creator: hippodriver@gmx.net
text:
The name of the jdk16 distribution downlodable from freebsdfoundation has changed, so the port doesn't work anymore.

Old name, required by the ports Makefile:
diablo-caffe-freebsd7-amd64-1.6.0_07-b02.tar.bz2

New name, from FreeBSD Foundation:
diablo-jdk-freebsd7.amd64.1.6.0.07.02.tbz


Kind regards,
Michael Krauss
